texto: Memoir writing draws on all aspects of who we are, body, mind and soul. We are challenged to dig deep, to remember, and once again inhabit the skin of who we were and what we have learned. Writing memoir is an act of testimony, witnessing, healing. When you write a memoir, you draw upon layers of your consciousness and discover your true nature, your essential self, and are transformed the process.” Linda Joy Meyer
explicacao: Citação de Rossandra White sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Memoir writing draws on all aspects of who we are, body, mind and soul.
